data.name: ActionNotInitializedMessage
data.value: The action type is not initialized.

data.name: ActionParameterValueInvalid
data.value: Error in action: '{0}'. The action parameter value is invalid.

data.name: ActionParameterInvalidType
data.value: Error in action: '{0}'. The action parameter has invalid type.

data.name: ActionParameterNotSpecifiedMessage
data.value: Error in action: '{0}'. Action parameter is not specified.

data.name: ActionParameterTypeNotSpecifiedMessage
data.value: Error in action: '{0}'. Action parameter type is not specified or is wrong.

data.name: CantGetTimeZoneMessage
data.value: Can't get timeZone with ID {0}

data.name: ColorNotInitializedMessage
data.value: The item should have specified color.

data.name: EndDateNotInitializedMessage
data.value: End date in not initialized.

data.name: ExclusionIntersectionMessage
data.value: Current exclusion intersects with exclusion with identifier {0} in timezone {1}.

data.name: ExclusionTypeExceptionMessage
data.value: Only exclusion shift type is allowed for exclusion object.

data.name: IdentifierNotInitializedMessage
data.value: The item identifier is not initialized.

data.name: IndexOutOfRangeExceptionMessage
data.value: Index is less than zero or is greater than collection size.

data.name: InvalidGuidStringMessage
data.value: Couldn't convert string '{0}' to GUID value.

data.name: InvalidItemExceptionMessage
data.value: Item is in invalid state.

data.name: ItemNotFoundMessage
data.value: Item with identifier {0} was not found in the collection.

data.name: ItemNotInitializedExceptionMessage
data.value: The item is not initialized.

data.name: ItemNullExceptionMessage
data.value: Item cannot be null.

data.name: NameNotInitializedMessage
data.value: The item should have name.

data.name: ParameterValueCouldntBeConvertedMessage
data.value: Parameter value '{0}' couldn't be converted to action parameter type.

data.name: RemovedItemCannotBeNullException
data.value: You cannot remove null value.

data.name: RespondentTimezoneName
data.value: Respondent

data.name: RuleIsInUseMessage
data.value: Rule {0} is used in 'Set next rule' action of sub-rule {1}.{2}.

data.name: RuleNumberFormatExceptionMessage
data.value: Rule or sub-rule number should be in format "number" or "number.number".

data.name: ShiftIntersectionMessage
data.value: Current shift intersects with shift with identifier {0} in timezone {1}.

data.name: ShiftTypeIsInUseMessage
data.value: Shift type '{0}' is used in {1} with identifier {2}.

data.name: ShiftTypeNotInitializedMessage
data.value: Shift type is not initialized.

data.name: StartDateGreaterEndDateMessage
data.value: Start date is greater than end date.

data.name: StartDateNotInitializedMessage
data.value: Start date in not initialized.

data.name: SubRuleIsInUseMessage
data.value: Sub-rule {0} is used in 'Go to' action of sub-rule {1}.

data.name: TimezoneOutOfRangeException
data.value: The timezone does not exist in the list of timezones and is not Respondent timezone.

data.name: UnrecognizedActionMessage
data.value: Action with identifier '{0}' doesn't belong to actions dictionary.

data.name: ValidationNotSupportedExceptionMessage
data.value: There is no event handler attached to validation event.

data.name: ActionParameterUserOrGroupDoesntExistMessage
data.value: Error in action: '{0}'. Specified user or group doesn't exist.

data.name: ActionParameterInvalidGroupMessage
data.value: Error in action: '{0}'. The specified group either does not exist or is an administrative group.
